Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkLocalProjectDependency

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkComputedDependency
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkLocalProjectDependency
All Implemented Interfaces:
JkDependency, JkFileDependency, JkTransitivityDependency
public class JkLocalProjectDependency extends JkComputedDependency implements JkTransitivityDependency

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkLocalProjectDependency of(Runnable producer, Path file, Path basedir, JkDependencySet dependencies)
      Constructs a JkLocalProjectDependency from an artifact producer and the artifact file id one is interested on.
      Parameters:
      producer - The runnable producing the jar file.
      file - The jar file
      basedir - The base directory of the project producing the jar file. Optional (IDE support)
      dependencies - The dependencies that will be consumed by the depender. It's not the dependencies needed to compile the jar but the ones that would be published.

    • getExportedDependencies

      public JkDependencySet getExportedDependencies()
      Returns the dependencies that will be consumed by the depender. This is not the dependencies needed to compile the jar but the ones that would be published.

    • getTransitivity

      public JkTransitivity getTransitivity()
      Specified by:
      getTransitivity in interface JkTransitivityDependency

    • withIdeProjectDir

      public JkLocalProjectDependency withIdeProjectDir(Path path)
      Description copied from interface: JkDependency
      Returns a dependency identical to this one but with the specified project base dir.
      Specified by:
      withIdeProjectDir in interface JkDependency
      Overrides:
      withIdeProjectDir in class JkComputedDependency
      See Also:
      • JkDependency.getIdeProjectDir()
